# Tailored Tech Solutions

> AI software studio building production AI products, mobile apps, and bespoke engineering software.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, founders, projects, and contact.

## Projects

- [Big League Swings](/projects/big-league-swings): Mobile Hit Trax batting-cage experience with pro-grade analytics.
- [Terra Farming](/projects/terra-farming): Agriculture intelligence platform connecting farmers, buyers, drivers, and HQ.
